word: G366 - ἀνανήφω - ananḗphō - an-an-ay'-fo - Recover self

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνανήφω

- Transliteration: Ananepho

- Phonetic: an-an-ay'-fo

- Definition:

1. to return to soberness

- Origin: from G303 and G3525

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G3525; to become sober again that is (figuratively) regain (one´ s) senses: - recover self.
